case_title: PRINCESS KHADIJAH M JACOB-FAMBRO VS. DONALD J TRUMP

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-22-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-22-2019 AT 10:30 AM. ALL PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED SANCTIONS AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF ARE VACATED. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACOB-FAMBRO, PRINCESS KHADIJAH M PRINCESS FOR PRESIDENT 2020 AS TO DEFENDANT TRUMP, DONALD J PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES THE WITE HOUSE 950 PENNSYLVANIA AVE NW WASHINGTON, D.C. 20530-0001 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-26-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-26-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-03-2019

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACOB-FAMBRO, PRINCESS KHADIJAH M PRINCESS FOR PRESIDENT 2020 ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-06-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-26-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-06-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF PRINCESS KHADIJAH M JACOB-FAMBRO FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-06-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-23-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-06-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-22-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2019 Continued To Oct-22-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-22-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. *** NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). *** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
